flow_def.json
· opaque NMOS-shaped flow definition
written once by libmxl FlowWriter; read by libmxl FlowReader; stat()ed by the shim

div.div:
Lifetime is tied to the libmxl FlowWriter handle on this node.
Closing the writer removes <flowID>.mxl-flow/ from tmpfs; consumer
FlowReader handles on the same node become invalid. The target-side
gateway's recovery path keeps the writer alive on purpose for this reason.

switch.text: Lifetime is tied to the libmxl FlowWriter handle on this node....

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 220px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
agent.sock
· UNIX-domain socket file
listen: mxl-domain-agent (mode 0666)
SO_PEERCRED → caller PID → pod lookup
bind-mounted into consumer pods so the
LD_PRELOAD shim can connect from inside

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 383px; margin-left: 1030px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tmpfs is volatile
Nothing survives a node reboot.
/run/mxl itself is provisioned outside
Kubernetes (host init / a privileged
bootstrap step), not by mxl-k8s.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 543px; margin-left: 1030px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
hostPath mounts on this node
Every pod that opens libmxl must mount
/run/mxl/domain (writers + readers +
agent + gateway). The agent additionally
bind-mounts /run/mxl/agent.sock into any
consumer pod that uses the LD_PRELOAD shim.
